description:
GATED ON G1 + F4 + B-arc complete for cons.

What: When a list-rebuilding fn (map, filter, etc.) has a uniquely-owned cons input in the RC arena, reuse cells in place.

CLIF impact: strict reduction — removes per-cell alloc on the unique path.

Removes: redundant per-cell allocations when input is unique.

Tests: golden CLIF on list map fixture; fallback tested for shared lists.
title: fz-dps.G3: FBIP rewrite — list rebuild in place
